title: S4 Run engine — kanban board evidence

beats.caption: AC-1 — lists map to a phase, no per-list config
beats.expectedScreen: the kanban board: Backlog/To Do/Discuss show a kind·trigger subheader while Plan and Implement columns show a 'phase: …' subheader

segments.caption: AC-1 — the Plan list carries only a phase (no skill/taskType/tier/mode)
segments.expectedScreen: the Plan list JSON with "phase": "plan" highlighted and no skill/taskType/tier/mode fields present

highlight.note: the only classification a list carries — skill/taskType/tier/mode resolve from the compiled policy (D15)

beats.caption: AC-2 — a work kind gives the card its rail (phase plan)
beats.expectedScreen: the New card sheet with the full-feature work kind selected and its rail phases as chips: PLAN, IMPLEMENT, REVIEW, ADVERSARIAL-REVIEW, TEST … REPORT

beats.caption: AC-2 — the card lands in the entry list carrying its work kind
beats.expectedScreen: the Backlog column with the new 'Add CSV export' card showing an acme-app and a full-feature chip

beats.caption: AC-3 — with the plan gate evidence, the card advanced Plan → Implement
beats.expectedScreen: the 'Add server-side pagination' card in the Implement column, its activity line reading 'Plan → Implement (in-session)' with an engine-owned chip

segments.caption: AC-3 — the durable plan-phase gate the engine required before advancing
segments.expectedScreen: the run directory's gate-status.json with the gates.plan entry highlighted

highlight.note: the plan phase's gate entry — its presence in the runDir is what let the card advance (D9)

beats.caption: AC-4 — advancing WITHOUT gate evidence parks the card needs-attention
beats.expectedScreen: the 'Wire the export button' card in the Needs attention column with the red reason 'no durable gate evidence for the plan phase'

segments.source: PATCH /cards/{id} · manual move of the engine-owned card
segments.caption: AC-5 — a manual move into a locked autonomous list is rejected (HTTP 403)
segments.expectedScreen: the PATCH response showing 'HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden' highlighted, with an 'engine-owned' error body below

highlight.note: the board API rejects a manual move on a card sitting on an autonomous list — engine-owned (D16)
